content.en:
For such a long time, Ye Tian has been trying to create a top-notch supreme technique on the other side.

this day.

A top-notch Beyond Supreme Technique was finally created by Ye Tian.

This top-of-the-line Beyond Supreme Technique is much more powerful than the Endless Golden Arm, and it is also the top-of-the-line Beyond Shore Supreme Technique of the attack type.

Ye Tian named this Beyond Shore Supreme Technique the Beyond Shore Slashing Technique!

When the other side of the slashing technique is cast, it will turn into a light that slashes everything, and the attack power is very terrifying.

After creating the Other Shore Slashing Technique, Ye Tian's strength naturally improved tremendously.

And in these years, Ye Tian has also built the Eternal Ruins Divine Array again and again to comprehend the origin rules of the other side.

A long time ago, his other side origin rule had reached seventy out of nine.

But so far, he still hasn't reached the eighty percent realm.

It seems that even the Eternal Ruins Divine Array can't help him break the boundary of eighty percent.

this day.

Ye Tian chatted with the Lord of Qingyun again and asked for knowledge in this regard.

......

"Lord Qingyun, I'm stuck in a bottleneck again, after the Origin Rule of the other side reaches seventy percent and nine, I can't continue to improve!" Ye Tian said helplessly.

The Lord of Qingyun was also surprised by Ye Tian's progress, but still said: "Endless Lord, the higher the realm of the Origin Rules on the other side, the more difficult it is to improve. From the realm of the origin rules of the other shore of seventy percent to the realm of the origin rules of the other shore of eighty percent, this is a very big difficulty. If you want to break through this difficulty, it is very difficult to do it just by relying on the Eternal Ruins God Array. "

"What's the solution?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Qingyun thought for a moment and said, "There are some opportunities in the land of the Eternal Shore that can help you break the shackles, but those opportunities have a time limit and have not yet been opened. Anyway, as far as I know, relying on my own slow enlightenment, it is almost impossible to raise the Origin Rules of the Other Shore to the eighty percent realm, so I can only wait for the opportunity. Until the opportunity comes, there is little that can be done. I'm now trapped in the Origin Rule Realm on the other side, and I want to break through to the Ninety Percent realm, but unfortunately I can't do it!"

Ye Tian saw that the Lord of Qingyun had no choice but to leave.

In the following years, Ye Tian slowly cultivated asceticly, improved his Origin Will, comprehended more Golden Scripts on the Other Side, and tried to create a second top-notch Supreme Technique on the Other Side.

At the same time, he is also inquiring about the news to see if there are any big opportunities.

this day.

He also really inquired about a piece of news that would help him break the realm of the Origin Rules on the other side.

......

Innocent Island.

At this time, many Origin Heavenly Ancestors were discussing an opportunity in the Innocent Abyss.

"The Abyss Tree on the other side of the Innocent Abyss is about to give birth to a batch of Abyss Fruits on the other side, one Abyss Fruit on the other side is enough for us to quickly comprehend the origin rules of the other side, and it is said that it is useful to the Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Middle Realm who have reached the eighty percent realm of the origin rules of the other side!"

"But there is a powerful race creature in the Abyss Tree on the other side, the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan, the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan of the Innocent Abyss is very powerful, and there are even more than ten existences comparable to the Origin Upper Realm, who dares to snatch the Abyss Fruit on the other side?"

"Even the top-notch Origin Middle Realm doesn't dare to snatch it, and only the Origin Upper Realm dares to snatch it. "

"Last time, there were six Origin Origin Realm to snatch it, but they only grabbed a little bit, and several Origin Origin Middle Realm took the opportunity to snatch the Abyss Fruit on the other side, and three of them were killed. "

"Those Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors are also dead, if they dare to snatch the Abyss Fruit of the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan, they will even be injured in the Origin Upper Realm, not to mention them?"

"Anyway, the Abyss Tree on the other side is so precious, why don't those Origin Upper Realm existences join forces to destroy the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan?"

"Hehe, destroy it, after it is destroyed, the Abyss Tree on the other side can only grow and give birth to the Abyss Fruit on the other side of the Abyss! Even if the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan is destroyed, who will guard it? The Innocent Abyss is very dangerous, and it will still be occupied by other powerful Innocent Abyss creatures!"

"It is said that a long time ago, it was not the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan that occupied the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan on the other side, but another creature, which was destroyed and later occupied by the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan. "

"Yes, many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors don't want to destroy the Abyss Demon Dragon, for them, the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan is guarding the Abyss Tree on the other side for them. When the abyssal fruit on the other side is born, they will snatch it, which is more convenient. "

......

Ye Tian knew the news of the Abyss Tree on the other side, and he was naturally full of interest in the Abyss Fruit on the other side.

But he also knew how terrifying the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan guarded by the Abyss Tree on the other side was, and even the top-level Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor would fall, so he naturally couldn't bear this bit of strength.

However, he is not without a little opportunity.

He can completely copy the body of an abyssal demon dragon and take the opportunity to snatch the abyss fruit on the other side during the great battle.

When the time comes, the Abyss Demon Dragon Clan will definitely not attack them.

As for the existence of the Origin Upper Realm, it should occupy a weak position, and the possibility of attacking oneself will be smaller.

It's always a bit more successful than copying your real body to snatch the abyss fruit on the other side.

Anyway, you have to give it a try.

If he succeeds, he may be able to raise the Origin Rule of the Other Shore to the eighty percent realm.

Meanwhile.

The four Origin Ascenders of Wind Tooth Island were also discussing the matter of the Abyss Tree on the other side, and the Lord of the White Capital was also among them.

The four Origin Upper Realms of Wind Tooth Island are the Lord of Ice and Rain, the Lord of Wind Fang, the Lord of Qin Sound and the Lord of Cave Xuan, among which the most powerful is the Lord of Wind Fang, who is also the owner of Wind Tooth Island, and the other three are all deputy island masters.

Then.

The Lord of the Wind Teeth said: "Everyone, the Lord of the White Capital is the most promising Origin Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor who has the most hope of becoming the Origin Upper Realm, and his cultivation is only lower at present, if he can raise the Origin Rule on the other side to the ninety percent two realm, he can reach the extreme of the Origin Middle Realm, and he can go to the Origin Upper Realm." And the abyss fruit on the other side is an opportunity. "

Hearing this, the Lord of the White Capital immediately said, "Wind Tooth Island Lord, I'm going to fight for a chance by myself." "

"What are you fighting for, you are only in the Origin Middle Realm, if you go, the chance of death is too high. This time, we Fengya Island sent two Origin Ascenders to the realm, and we should be able to capture a few Abyss Fruits on the other side. The Lord of the Wind Teeth said.

However, the Lord of the White Capital also knows the danger, and the Origin Realm is not necessarily safe.

Because the Origin Upper Realm will be targeted by the Abyss Demon Dragon of the Origin Upper Realm, maybe the Abyss Demon Dragon will also call a helper.

If you're not careful, the Origin Upper Realm will also fall.

And if you are lucky in the Origin Middle Realm, you can also hope to capture the Abyss Fruit on the other side!

"Don't worry, this time there are more Origin Upper Realms going to the Abyss Tree on the other side, and we still have an advantage. The Lord of the Wind Teeth said. ~
